text:
·˚✿ POLLINATIONS WEEKLY ✿˚·
vol.42 — audio upgrades & quest logs

22 PRs merged this week. We swapped out some audio engines and replaced subscriptions with a quest system.

───

→ THE GREAT AUDIO UPGRADE
Added Stable Audio 3 via Stability's official API and Stable Audio 3 Medium via fal. Upgraded elevenmusic to v2 with reference-audio conditioning, plus ElevenLabs SFX and Multilingual v2. Generating decent noise is now significantly easier.

→ QUESTS OVER TIERS
Subscriptions are gone. We shipped the first iteration of the quest system: a rewards ledger, per-user checks, and a public catalog. You do useful things, you get Pollen credits. We also scrubbed the old subscription tier copy from the docs, which is always a good day.

→ MODELS & ROUTING
Added the Inception Mercury model to codex and fixed a routing bug so text modalities actually pass to providers correctly. Also documented that publishable keys are replaced by Bring Your Own Provider (BYOP) in auth.

→ COMMUNITY
Added REKTY AI to bots and consolidated a backlog of stale app submission PRs.

───

Code, roadmap, and the new quest catalog are open on GitHub.

#OpenSource #AI #WebAudio #Developers
